title: Create Curio Goggles
description: A mod for Minecraft 1.16.5 that adds the Create Goggles to the Curios head slot.
body:
#### What does this mod do? ####

This mod makes it so that you can wear the Engineer's Goggles from Create in a Curios head slot and still see the stress information overlay that you'd normally get when they're equipped in your armor head slot.

#### Why is this needed? ####

Newer versions of Create, mainly for Minecraft 1.18.2 and later, have support for Curios built-in. Older versions, notably those for Minecraft 1.16.5, do not. This mod aims to fill that gap.

#### Frequently Asked Questions ####

**Q: Aren't there other mods that do this?**

**A:** Yes and no. There are other mods similar to this which either add new items which act as a helmet and the Engineer's Goggles in one or simply let you put the Engineer's Goggles in a Curios head slot. Those mods either do not integrate with other mods (e.g. they only provide vanilla helmet + Engineer's Goggles combo items) or no longer work/are not being maintained.

**Q: Which versions of Minecraft is this mod for?**

**A:** 1.16.5 only.

**Q: Which versions of Create is this mod for?**

**A:** 0.3.2g only.

**Q: Which versions of Curios is this mod for?**

**A:** 4.1.0.0 or newer.

**Q: Can you add feature X?**

**A:** No. This mod has one purpose only and it already does that.

**Q: How can I support you/your mods?**

**A:** By using them! If you want to provide more direct support please consider using the PayPal link on this project page.

**Q: Can I use this mod in modpacks?**

**A:** Yes on the condition that you do not misrepresent the origin of this mod.
